ssoDescription: Configure Single Sign-On (SAML 2.0 or OIDC) for your organization
scimDescription: Manage automatic user provisioning via SCIM 2.0
autoProvisionDesc: Automatically create accounts for new SSO users
enforceSsoDesc: Disable local password login (admin retains break-glass access)
enforceSsoDialogDesc: This will disable email/password login for all non-admin users in this organization.
enforceSsoWarning: Only the initial admin account will retain local login access via the break-glass login page. All other users must authenticate via SSO.
generateTokenDesc: Create a new bearer token for SCIM provisioning. The token will be shown only once.
tokenOnceWarning: Copy this token now. It will not be shown again.
revokeTokenDesc: This will immediately invalidate the token. Any IdP integration using this token will stop working.
loginSubtitle: Sign in to the GRC Platform
ssoEnforced: SSO is enforced for this organization. Please use the SSO button.
breakGlassWarning: This login is restricted to organization administrators. All access attempts are logged and audited.
breakGlassError: Authentication failed. Only admin accounts are permitted.
loginBrandingDescription: Unified audit, risk, compliance, and trust management for enterprise organizations.
loginFooter: Self-hosted. ISO 27001 compliant. Your data stays yours.
brandLetterA: udit — tamper-evident audit trails and internal audit
brandLetterR: isk — enterprise risk management with ISO 31000 and FAIR
brandLetterC: ompliance — 46 frameworks from ISO 27001 to DORA, AI Act, and GDPR
brandLetterT: rust — data sovereignty, audit hash chain, RBAC, and Three Lines of Defense
brandLetterOS: — Operating System: the integrated platform that runs your GRC
brandEtymology: The name also echoes the constellation Arctos (Greek for "bear") — the northernmost reference point of ancient navigators. ARCTOS is the reliable anchor on your governance map.
